channel.title: Database on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in Database on LiaScript

item.title: Comunica for LiaScript: Run SPARQL Queries and Explore Knowledge Graphs
item.description: The Semantic Web and Linked Open Data are among the richest topics in computer science and information science — but teaching SPARQL interactively has always required running a server.

item.title: dbdiagram for LiaScript: Design and Visualize Database Schemas with DBML
item.description: Database schema diagrams are hard to maintain. Draw them by hand and they drift from the code. Use a screenshot and it’s outdated the moment the schema changes.

item.title: PGlite for LiaScript: Full PostgreSQL in the Browser
item.description: Teaching SQL usually means setting up a database server, managing connections, and keeping student environments in sync. The PGlite template removes all of that.

item.title: PouchDB for LiaScript: NoSQL Documents and Mango Queries in the Browser
item.description: Relational databases are one way to store data. Documents are another. The PouchDB template brings PouchDB — a JavaScript database inspired by Apache CouchDB — directly into your LiaScript courses.

item.title: Redis for LiaScript: Explore Key-Value Stores and Data Structures in the Browser
item.description: Redis is one of the most widely used databases in the world — but teaching it interactively has always meant running a Redis server. The Redis template removes that requirement entirely.

item.title: AlaSQL for LiaScript: Teach SQL and Query CSV Data in the Browser
item.description: SQL is not only for relational databases. With the AlaSQL template, you can run SQL queries inside LiaScript courses against in-memory tables, JavaScript arrays, and CSV files — entirely in the browser.

item.title: DuckDB for LiaScript: Teach Data Analytics Directly in the Browser
item.description: Modern data analysis relies on SQL. With the DuckDB template, you can teach analytical queries interactively — learners write real SQL, run it immediately, and see results as formatted tables or charts, right inside the course.

item.title: SQLite for LiaScript: Teach SQL Interactively in the Browser
item.description: SQL is the foundational language of data. With the SQLite template, you can teach it interactively — learners write real SQL, run it immediately, and see the results as formatted tables, right inside the course.
